speaker: speaker1
text: What's up ? You sound a little down in dumps .

speaker: speaker2
text: I quarreled with my roommate last night . He is really stubborn .

speaker: speaker1
text: Calm down ! Shouting won ’ t help ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I went back home last night . You know tired as a dog , so I took a quick shower and went to bed . I couldn't fall asleep , because Brian was there in the living room , playing his stupid stereo so loud . I kindly told him to turn that down a little bit . He shouted at me .

speaker: speaker1
text: What ? He can't do this to you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , he did it anyway . Then he came into my room and shot all his shit blah blah blah ... you know .

speaker: speaker2
text: I shouted it back of course .

speaker: speaker1
text: Hold it , Mike . You won't accomplish anything by hollering at him , right ? You worked it all up till now . Why not wait until you cool down a bit ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What would you do if you were in my shoes ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Just stay cool . You know . When you get back home tonight , tell him that you didn't mean to quarrel with him .

speaker: speaker2
text: No way , Kate . I mean it's just not my fault .

speaker: speaker1
text: I know . It wouldn't hurt much to say sorry first . And after that , you can casually mention the problem . I am sure he will cooperate .

speaker: speaker2
text: I am too angry to do that .
